style_effects: Gentle, iridescent fairy dust particles drift lazily upward in soft, pastel-colored trails, refracting light like tiny prisms. An ethereal, pearlescent aura surrounds the body in delicate petal-shaped waves, pulsing with a pale lavender glow that casts a warm, inviting light. The lighting mood is a soothing blend of soft pink and mint-green luminescence, with faint musical note vibrations shimmering in the air like delicate, translucent ripples. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
